candidate_lesson: A rate-divergence SHORT that fires while HTF market structure is BULLISH and no CHOCH/BOS confirms the trade direction is a counter-structure macro bet that loses even with a valid FVG and liquidity sweep.
testable_rule: if signal_direction != htf_structure_direction and not structure_shift_confirmed and abs(rate_diff_z) < 1.2: veto_trade()
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
